variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 46213 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 46213 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 46213 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 288.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 276.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 244.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 39.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 33.0 mm

variants.title: Mann Filter C 28 150 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 46213
variants.option1Value: Mann Filter C 28 150 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 46213
variants.description: High-quality MANN-FILTER air filters for clean air intake and optimum protection for your engine, mass air flow sensor & other sensitive components / They meet requirements of modern engine technology. Highest dirt holding capacity and dirt separation efficiency, low flow resistance and high pleat stability ensure functional reliability during the entire service interval.
specifications: Style: Air Filter, Dimension A: 290.0 mm, Dimension B: 246.0 mm, Dimension H: 37.0 mm

variants.title: Fleetguard AF26324 Air Filter Filter - Panel | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 46213
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard AF26324 Air Filter Filter - Panel | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 46213
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF26324 panel air filter provides optimized airflow designed with OEM requirements. Protect your investment and extend the life of your equipment with a filter that delivers superior protection.
